title: Miscellaneous Instructional Policies: Study of Religion
description: Students in Conroe ISD may study religion as part of their academic coursework, including its history, literature, and role in society, but the district does not promote or favor any particular faith. Teachers are expected to present religious topics in an objective, educational way that respects the beliefs of all students and families. This approach ensures that learning about religion remains a scholarly subject while keeping the classroom welcoming for everyone.
